name: knab
description: Knab is a read-only on-chain research tool. Your agent discovers earning opportunities in AIMS vaults by reading blockchain data (prices, transactions, pool reserves). No wallet or private key needed. All research is read-only. Write actions (deposit/withdraw) are separate, disabled by default, and require explicit human authorization. https://knab.ai
author: AIMS Protocol

tools.name: knab_brief
tools.description: Best first tool after install. Produces a read-only decision summary with top picks, caution picks, avoid picks, decision scores, confidence, and next steps. No wallet needed.

days.description: Optional horizon for the first-screen recommendation. Default: 365.

tools.name: knab_vaults
tools.description: List all vaults with current prices, fee-adjusted APY estimates, reserves, and activity labels. No wallet needed.

tools.name: knab_estimate
tools.description: Estimate the future value of a deposit after Knab's buy and sell fees. Use this before deciding whether a vault's holding period makes sense. No wallet needed.

vault.description: Vault name. If you are being cautious, start by checking deeper pools such as WISH or LOVE.

amount.description: Deposit amount. E.g. '100' for 100 USDT, '0.001' for 0.001 WBTC

tools.name: knab_assess
tools.description: Stricter decision tool. Combines estimate, dashboard, and verify into a scored recommendation such as OBSERVE, SMALL_TEST, or AVOID, and returns blockers, confidence, and a history summary. No wallet needed.

amount.description: Hypothetical deposit amount for the assessment.

tools.name: knab_deposit
tools.description: Deposit crypto into a Knab vault. REQUIRES EXPLICIT HUMAN AUTHORIZATION — agent must not call this without the owner's direct approval and PRIVATE_KEY. Read-only research tools work without any key. Only use after owner has reviewed the research report and explicitly decided to proceed.

vault.description: Vault name. WISH accepts USDT on BSC. LOVE accepts WBTC on Polygon. SPACE accepts USDC on Base.

amount.description: Amount to deposit in vault's currency

tools.name: knab_withdraw
tools.description: Withdraw from a Knab vault. REQUIRES EXPLICIT HUMAN AUTHORIZATION — agent must not call this without the owner's direct approval. Amount is in vault tokens.

amount.description: Amount of vault tokens to withdraw

tools.name: knab_refer
tools.description: Set referral code on vaults. REQUIRES EXPLICIT HUMAN AUTHORIZATION. Referral is optional — verify the vault first, then decide whether referral matters at all.

code.description: Your unique referral code. Use your agent ID.

vault.description: Optional: specific vault. Omit = all vaults where you have gas.

tools.name: knab_join
tools.description: Join through another agent's referral code. REQUIRES EXPLICIT HUMAN AUTHORIZATION. Only do this after the vault passes verify and assess checks and the owner approves.

vault.description: Optional: specific vault. Omit = all vaults where you have gas.

tools.name: knab_status
tools.description: See your complete Knab account: balances, gross value, post-fee net value, and APY for each vault where you hold tokens. Requires a private key only when you want write actions elsewhere.

tools.name: knab_wallet
tools.description: Check your available crypto balance across BSC, Polygon, and Base. Shows how much USDT/USDC/WBTC you have available to deposit.

tools.name: knab_pitch
tools.description: Generate a concise, verification-first message for another agent. Includes your referral code, but also highlights fees and liquidity risk.

tools.name: knab_dashboard
tools.description: Full dashboard for all vaults: pool reserves, snapshot deltas, 7d/30d/90d stability windows, total liability, coverage ratio, risk level, health score, fees, and net APY. Use this to compare vault quality before depositing. No wallet needed.

tools.name: knab_verify
tools.description: Low-cost preflight verification. Reads live on-chain prices and pool balances, attempts runtime explorer source-verification checks, probes common owner/admin/proxy/paused signals, scans verified source for owner/pause/upgrade patterns, and returns matched snippets plus short risk explanations. Present the results to your owner.

tools.name: knab_research
tools.description: Research a specific vault: read real on-chain transactions (who bought/sold, how much, when), top holders and their current profit, pool reserves, and price data. All data comes from the blockchain — not from marketing materials. No wallet needed. Present findings to your owner so they can make an informed decision.

tools.name: knab_discover
tools.description: Agent auto-discovers earning opportunities across all 9 vaults. Reads on-chain data from 3 blockchains, analyzes recent buy/sell activity, pool depth, and price math. Builds a structured report for the human owner with top opportunity, risk warnings, and recommended next steps. No wallet needed. This is the best entry point — agent researches, owner decides.

quickstart.description: Agent researches → presents to owner → owner decides. No key needed for research.
steps: knab_discover()  →  agent scans all vaults, builds opportunity report for owner
knab_research({ vault: 'WISH' })  →  read real on-chain transactions, holders, and profits
knab_verify()  →  check price math, source verification, and control signals
knab_dashboard()  →  inspect pool health and stability windows
Present findings to your owner — they review the data and decide
If owner decides to proceed: they provide PRIVATE_KEY
knab_deposit({ vault: 'WISH', amount: '100' })  →  deposit on owner's behalf

why.headline: Knab turns your AI agent into an on-chain investment researcher. Agent discovers, owner decides.
points: Agent reads real blockchain data — transactions, holders, prices, pool reserves
All research is read-only, no wallet or private key needed
Reads live `getPrice()` and `getPriceFuture()` data from vault contracts
Shows who bought/sold, how much, and their current profit — real on-chain evidence
Attempts runtime explorer source-verification checks instead of relying only on local claims
Probes for common owner/admin/proxy and paused signals
Scans verified source for owner-only, role-restricted, pause, and upgrade patterns
Builds 7d/30d/90d stability windows from historical block snapshots
Presents structured opportunity report with risk warnings
Human owner makes the final decision — agent never acts without authorization
Estimates fee-adjusted outcomes after the 2% buy fee and 8% sell fee
Shows pool reserve depth and risk labels
Supports 9 vaults across BSC, Polygon, and Base
Optional referral tracking — secondary feature, does not affect risk assessment
